outcome.description: Every debate ends typed — exactly one of the four. degenerate = no movement and no new residual; a degenerate debate licenses no follow-on.

converged.description: Actions all attendants endorse on the record, each with the turn that produced it.

residual.description: The surviving fork(s), one line each, with each attendant's last position. A named residual is a result, not a failure.

attendant.description: Attendant id — bull/bear in the 2-pole forum, seat-N in a seeded room.

position.description: That attendant's LAST position on this fork, from its post-interview or final debate turn.

instrument.description: THE CONVERGENCE PRODUCT: for each residual, the concrete move that would collapse it — a named diligence check, a milestone gate, a tranche condition. Never 'further discussion'. The memo's decision conditions consume these directly.

evolution.description: Per attendant, factual, grounded in the post-interviews: held / refined / conceded, with turn citations only. A real concession is the most valuable line in the record.

suggested_attendants.description: Voices the debate showed were missing, each with the named gap it would fill. Suggestions are recorded, never auto-spawned — inviting one is a new decision, not an automatic round. Empty array when the room sufficed.

authority_note.description: Always states: this adjudication is agent-derived — material for the investor to argue with, never an authority. Forum verdicts never settle their own case.
